title: The Missed Medication
description: Hypertensive patient BP spikes. Anamnesis reveals stopped ACE inhibitor due to cough.

triggering_alert.alert_message: Critical BP 178/108 mmHg, 6 consecutive high readings.

key_ehr_facts: Last visit: BP well-controlled at 128/82 two months ago
key_anamnesis_facts: Patient stopped Lisinopril 10 days ago due to persistent dry cough

gold_standard_brief.primary_concern: Hypertensive urgency secondary to self-discontinuation of ACE inhibitor due to cough side effect.
